active.description: When true (default), Tab key navigation is constrained within the trap container. Set to false to temporarily suspend trapping without unmounting.

restoreFocus.description: When true (default), returns focus to the previously focused element when the trap is deactivated or unmounted.

initialFocus.description: CSS selector for the element that should receive focus when the trap activates. Falls back to `fallbackFocus` when the selector matches nothing.

fallbackFocus.description: CSS selector for the element that receives focus when `initialFocus` is unset or unresolvable. Defaults to the trap container itself.

class.description: Additional class applied to the focus-trap wrapper element.
